description: The BillboardBrushTool is a Brush Tool that draws ribbons.

fields.MinRotation: the minimum rotation the generated geometry can have.
fields.MaxRotation: the maximum rotation the generated geometry can have.
fields.RotationGap: the bias of the rotation of generated geometry
fields.UseRotation: Whether the generated geometry should use rotation.
fields.UseSize: Whether the generated geometry should utilize size arguments.
fields.UseUV: Whether the generated geometry should have UVs.

methods.ChangeSize: Handles changing the size of the brush of a brush tool.
